variants.title: Vac-U-Flex Vinyl Wire Reinforced Vacuum Hose

description.plain: Vac-U-Flex Vinyl Wire Reinforced Vacuum Hose is designed to be compatible with most central vacuum systems, making it a versatile choice for your cleaning needs. This durable hose features a 1.25-inch diameter and comes in a convenient 50-foot length, sold by the foot to fit your specific requirements. Please note that the hose does not include end fittings, allowing you to customize it as needed for your setup. Its reinforced vinyl construction ensures flexibility and strength, providing reliable performance during use. Model Number: 32-1247-67

products.title: Flex-Tube PE

description.plain: Lightweight, UV-stabilized polyethylene hose with a rigid helix for efficient airflow and durability in vacuum applications.

unique_selling_points: Combines flexibility, crush resistance, and a rigid helix for efficient airflow in lightweight vacuum systems.
metadata.top_features:
UV-stabilized polyethylene construction: Ensures long-lasting durability in outdoor or industrial environments
Rigid external polyethylene helix: Maintains hose shape and resists wear for extended service life
Smooth interior wall: Promotes efficient airflow and reduces friction
Crush resistant design: Withstands pressure and prevents accidental damage
Lightweight build: Easy to handle and install in various applications
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: Black polyethylene copolymer
Wall Thickness: 0.012 in
Color: Black
Hose Material: Plastic
Pattern: Solid

media.alt_text: Flex-Tube PE Hose – hose product image from Wholesale Hoses

description.plain: Ultra-Light Polyethylene Hose for Lightweight Vacuum Applications The Flex-Tube PE is a UV-stabilized black polyethylene copolymer hose with a rigid external polyethylene helix that doubles as a wearstrip. At .012" wall thickness, it is one of the lightest hoses in our lineup — built for lightweight vacuum applications where minimizing hose weight matters more than heavy-wall durability. The smooth interior wall delivers efficient airflow with minimal friction loss. The external helix protects the hose wall during drag-along use. Where the Flex-Tube PE Fits This hose is well-suited for industrial vacuum cleaning, textile fiber collection, paper and textile process air, fume ventilation, and general lightweight air handling. The polyethylene construction and UV stabilization make it a good fit for indoor or outdoor use. Sizing & Install Best Practices Match inside diameter to your vacuum system or air handler inlet. The .012" wall makes this hose very light but also thinner than polyurethane alternatives — avoid applications with heavy abrasive material or sharp debris that could puncture the wall. For heavier-duty vacuum and dust collection, the Flex-Tube PV or Flex-Tube PU offer thicker polyurethane construction. Light weight UV stabilized black polyethylene copolymer hose with a black rigid external polyethylene helix. • Smooth interior wall assures efficient airflow • Very flexible & crush resistant • Ideal for lightweight vacuum applications • Helix acts as a wearstrip • Wall Thickness = .012" Hose Specifications: View, Print, or Download Applications The Flex-Tube PE is part of our selection for these applications: Air Handling Fume Ventilation Industrial Vacuum Cleaners Paper & Textile Polyethylene Hoses Textile Fiber Collection Vacuum Cleaning

description.plain: A durable, comfortable low voltage vacuum hose with a full swivel handle for easy, controlled suction cleaning.

unique_selling_points: Full swivel soft touch grip handle reduces wrist strain and enhances maneuverability during vacuuming.
metadata.top_features:
Full swivel handle design: Improves maneuverability and reduces wrist strain during use
Soft touch grip: Provides added comfort for extended cleaning sessions
Two-way on/off switch: Allows easy control of vacuum operation without walking back to the inlet
Quick button release: Enables fast and secure attachment or removal of the hose
Suction-only compatibility: Ensures reliable performance for standard vacuum systems

Connection Size: 1 3/8 inch
Hose Type: Low voltage (suction only, not compatible with power nozzles)
Handle: Full swivel, soft touch grip
Switch: Two-way on/off switch on handle
Color: Black

variants.title: Beam Super Flex 35 ft. Low Voltage Hose

description.plain: 1 3/8" x 35 ft. Peppercorn low-voltage on/off vacuum hose with a full swivel, soft-touch grip handle for comfortable use. Features a convenient two-way switch and button release for easy connection. This hose is designed for suction-only use and is not compatible with power nozzles. media.alt_text: Beam Super Flex 30 ft. Low Voltage Hose

variants.title: Beam Super Flex 30 ft. Low Voltage Hose

description.plain: The Beam Super Flex 1 3/8" x 30 ft. low-voltage vacuum hose is designed to deliver reliable suction and easy operation for central vacuum systems. Featuring a comfortable soft-touch grip handle with a full swivel design, this hose provides excellent maneuverability while reducing wrist strain during cleaning. The convenient two-way on/off switch located on the handle allows you to easily control your central vacuum system without needing to walk back to the inlet valve. A quick button release makes attaching and removing the hose simple and secure. Ideal for suction-only cleaning tasks such as floors, upholstery, and above-floor surfaces, the Beam Super Flex hose offers durable construction and dependable performance for everyday household cleaning. Made to work with the following brands: ACV, Aerus, Aggresor, Air King, Airstream, AirVac, Astrovac, Allegro, Aqua Air, Beam, Black & Decker, Broan, Brute, Budd, Cana-Vac, Cen-Tec, Centralux, Cirrus, CV International, Dirt Devil, DrainVac, DuoVac, DustCare, DynaVac, Easy-Flo, Electrolux, Eureka, Fasco, Filtex, Filter Queen, Frigidaire, Galaxie, Hayden, Honeywell, Hoover, Husky, Imperium, Kenmore, M & S, MD, Nadair, NuTone, OVO, Patton, Phoenix, Prolux, Powerlux, PowerStar, Pullman-Holt, Purvac, Riccar, Royal, SEBO, Sequoia, Signature, Simplicity, Smart Vac, Titan, Vacuflo, Vacumaid, Valet, Vent-A-Vac, Walvac, Wessel-Werk, Whirlpool, Zenex

media.alt_text: Vac-U-Flex Hose - 1-1/4 Inch x 50 Foot - Black - Vacuums and More

variants.title: Vac-U-Flex Hose - 1-1/4 Inch x 50 Foot - Black

description.plain: Cracked or collapsed hoses kill suction. This replacement hose fits your vacuum and restores full cleaning power. Even small cracks can cause significant air leaks. Inspect your hose regularly for cracks, blockages, or collapsed sections. Even small damage can significantly reduce suction at the cleaning head. Replace promptly to restore full cleaning effectiveness.
